description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.24 Docker image and the gitlab-org runner tag. Set GOPATH to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.GOPATH and define a common cache of .GOPATH/pkg/mod/ with pull policy. Add a job named download deps in the prepare stage that extends the common configuration, uses a cache keyed on go.mod and go.sum, runs the shell command `make deps-download`, and pushes the cache after execution. Include the external CI files .gitlab/ci/prepare.yml and .gitlab/ci/test.yml and add the danger-review component with rules limiting it to specific GitLab.com projects. Define workflow rules so the pipeline runs on merge requests, the default branch, tags, stable branches matching /^[\d-]+-stable(-ee)?$/ and any branch under security/.
